title: Byju's is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Byju's is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Full Stack Developer looking for your next big career move? Byju's in Faridabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Byju's:
Byju's is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Byju's!
